name: CFC 2.0 Replacement Screens
summary: With frequent use of your Boundless CFC 2.0 Vaporiser, the taste may become unpleasant.
description: With frequent use of your Boundless CFC 2.0 Vaporiser, the taste may become unpleasant. If this occurs, simply replace the screens with the official Boundless CFC 2.0 replacement screens. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
